suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update skill feedback guidance and/or review checks so workers do not mark `followedProcedure: true` when required procedure steps are skipped.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both reviewed design-system features reported `handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true`, while their transcript skeletons lacked required design-worker steps (reference-site study and other required checks).

rejectedObservations.observation: Skill-compliance signaling mismatch reported in both review files.
